Notes: Matches deploy/terraform/oci-citadel-dns.tf exactly - 6 real records (apex/www/api/the-workshop/spf/dmarc) - api is a record in this same zone not a delegated api.trancendos.com zone - the-workshop CNAME currently has no matching Traefik host rule (Forgejo's real rule is Host(trancendos.com) && PathPrefix(/the-workshop) which does not match a the-workshop.trancendos.com Host header) so the bare subdomain does not actually reach Forgejo yet - ACME uses Traefik-managed tlsChallenge (TLS-ALPN-01 per infra/traefik/traefik.yml) so no DNS-01 challenge record exists - SPF is a hard -all deny and DMARC is monitor-only p=none because workers/email-service/worker.py's SMTP_HOST is unset by default (no relay authorized to send yet) - no DKIM record exists for the same reason - tighten all three once a real SMTP relay is configured
